tools.name: get_server_info
tools.description: Get server status, Neo4j connection state, and usage hints. Call this first.

tools.name: query_nodes
tools.description: Query CPG nodes by type, name, file path, project_id, or language. Use this to discover node IDs.

tools.name: query_edges
tools.description: Query CPG edges by type, source, target, or project_id.

tools.name: get_node_by_id
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific node by ID (use query_nodes first to find IDs)

tools.name: find_path
tools.description: Find paths between two nodes in the CPG

tools.name: find_data_flow
tools.description: Find data flow paths between nodes

tools.name: find_control_flow
tools.description: Find control flow paths between nodes

tools.name: get_call_graph
tools.description: Get function call graph

tools.name: get_dependencies
tools.description: Get DEPENDS_ON (import) relationships for a File node

tools.name: analyze_function
tools.description: Analyze a function node in detail: callers, callees, CFG/DFG edges

tools.name: get_file_structure
tools.description: Get structure of a source code file

tools.name: detect_security_issues
tools.description: Detect potential security vulnerabilities (SQL injection, hardcoded secrets, unsafe eval, etc.)

tools.name: analyze_code_complexity
tools.description: Analyze cyclomatic and cognitive complexity of functions

tools.name: find_dead_code
tools.description: Identify potentially dead/unused code (unused functions, imports, private methods)

tools.name: analyze_change_impact
tools.description: Analyze the impact of changing a specific function (callers, transitive dependencies)

tools.name: find_similar_code
tools.description: Find similar code patterns to a given function based on AST structure

tools.name: get_architecture_metrics
tools.description: Get high-level architecture metrics (module coupling, cyclic dependencies, stability)

tools.name: get_code_context
tools.description: Get rich context around a specific code node for LLM consumption

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Perform semantic search over code using pattern matching

tools.name: suggest_refactoring
tools.description: Suggest refactoring opportunities for a function (extract method, rename, simplify)

tools.name: explain_code
tools.description: Generate a structured explanation of code for LLM consumption

tools.name: trace_variable
tools.description: Trace the lifecycle of a variable through the code (definitions, usages, modifications)

tools.name: get_test_coverage_info
tools.description: Get information about test coverage for a function

tools.name: analyze_path
tools.description: Trigger incremental CPG analysis on a specific file or subdirectory and store results into Neo4j

tools.name: expand_method_on_demand
tools.description: Expand a single method from ARCHITECTURAL skeleton to FULL CPG (AST + CFG + DFG)

tools.name: get_expansion_stats
tools.description: Get statistics about method expansion cache

tools.name: find_data_flow_with_auto_expand
tools.description: Find data flow paths between nodes, automatically expanding methods along the path if needed

tools.name: find_control_flow_with_auto_expand
tools.description: Find control flow paths between nodes, automatically expanding methods along the path if needed
